title: Checkout page freezes after clicking pay
description: When the user clicks on the "Pay Now" button, the page becomes unresponsive and no confirmation message is shown. The issue mostly happens during high traffic and sometimes requires refreshing the page.

title: Incorrect error message on login
description: Even when users enter the correct credentials, the system sometimes shows "Invalid Credentials". This confuses users and prevents them from logging in.

title: Search bar not returning relevant results
description: Searching for specific keywords does not return accurate results. The search sometimes shows unrelated items or no results at all.

title: Payment failure and data loss due to concurrent booking issue
description: During high traffic, when multiple users try to book the same event at the same time, the system creates duplicate bookings and sometimes processes multiple payments for a single seat. This results in payment errors, data inconsistency, and potential financial loss.
